entries.name: PccState
entries.code: PccState = ptr CcState

entries.name: ErrorFunc
entries.code: ErrorFunc = proc (opaque: pointer; msg: cstring) {.cdecl.}

entries.name: openCCState
entries.code:
proc openCCState(): PccState {.importc: "tcc_new", cdecl, raises: [], tags: [],
                               forbids: [].}
entries.description: create a new TCC compilation context

entries.name: closeCCState
entries.code:
proc closeCCState(s: PccState) {.importc: "tcc_delete", cdecl, raises: [],
                                 tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: free a TCC compilation context

entries.name: setErrorFunc
entries.code:
proc setErrorFunc(s: PccState; errorOpaque: pointer; errorFun: ErrorFunc) {.
    cdecl, importc: "tcc_set_error_func", raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: set error/warning display callback

entries.name: setOptions
entries.code:
proc setOptions(s: PccState; options: cstring) {.cdecl,
    importc: "tcc_set_options", raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: set a options

entries.name: addIncludePath
entries.code:
proc addIncludePath(s: PccState; pathname: cstring) {.cdecl,
    importc: "tcc_add_include_path", raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: add include path

entries.name: addSysincludePath
entries.code:
proc addSysincludePath(s: PccState; pathname: cstring) {.cdecl,
    importc: "tcc_add_sysinclude_path", raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: add in system include path

entries.name: defineSymbol
entries.code:
proc defineSymbol(s: PccState; sym, value: cstring) {.cdecl,
    importc: "tcc_define_symbol", raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: define preprocessor symbol 'sym'. Can put optional value

entries.name: undefineSymbol
entries.code:
proc undefineSymbol(s: PccState; sym: cstring) {.cdecl,
    importc: "tcc_undefine_symbol", raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: undefine preprocess symbol 'sym'

entries.name: addFile
entries.code:
proc addFile(s: PccState; filename: cstring): cint {.cdecl,
    importc: "tcc_add_file", raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: add a file (either a C file, dll, an object, a library or an ld script). Return -1 if error.

entries.name: compileString
entries.code:
proc compileString(s: PccState; buf: cstring): cint {.cdecl,
    importc: "tcc_compile_string", raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: compile a string containing a C source. Return non zero if error.

entries.name: OutputMemory
entries.code: OutputMemory: cint = 1
entries.description: output will be ran in memory (no output file) (default)

entries.name: OutputExe
entries.code: OutputExe: cint = 2
entries.description: executable file

entries.name: OutputDll
entries.code: OutputDll: cint = 3
entries.description: dynamic library

entries.name: OutputObj
entries.code: OutputObj: cint = 4
entries.description: object file

entries.name: OutputPreprocess
entries.code: OutputPreprocess: cint = 5
entries.description: preprocessed file (used internally)

entries.name: setOutputType
entries.code:
proc setOutputType(s: PccState; outputType: cint): cint {.cdecl,
    importc: "tcc_set_output_type", raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: set output type. MUST BE CALLED before any compilation

entries.name: addLibraryPath
entries.code:
proc addLibraryPath(s: PccState; pathname: cstring): cint {.cdecl,
    importc: "tcc_add_library_path", raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: equivalent to -Lpath option

entries.name: addLibrary
entries.code:
proc addLibrary(s: PccState; libraryname: cstring): cint {.cdecl,
    importc: "tcc_add_library", raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: the library name is the same as the argument of the '-l' option

entries.name: addSymbol
entries.code:
proc addSymbol(s: PccState; name: cstring; val: pointer): cint {.cdecl,
    importc: "tcc_add_symbol", raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: add a symbol to the compiled program

entries.name: outputFile
entries.code:
proc outputFile(s: PccState; filename: cstring): cint {.cdecl,
    importc: "tcc_output_file", raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: output an executable, library or object file. DO NOT call tcc_relocate() before.

entries.name: run
entries.code:
proc run(s: PccState; argc: cint; argv: cstringArray): cint {.cdecl,
    importc: "tcc_run", raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: link and run main() function and return its value. DO NOT call tcc_relocate() before.

entries.name: relocate
entries.code:
proc relocate(s: PccState; p: pointer): cint {.cdecl, importc: "tcc_relocate",
    raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: copy code into memory passed in by the caller and do all relocations (needed before using tcc_get_symbol()). returns -1 on error and required size if ptr is NULL

entries.name: getSymbol
entries.code:
proc getSymbol(s: PccState; name: cstring): pointer {.cdecl,
    importc: "tcc_get_symbol", raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: return symbol value or NULL if not found

entries.name: setLibPath
entries.code:
proc setLibPath(s: PccState; path: cstring) {.cdecl,
    importc: "tcc_set_lib_path", raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: set CONFIG_TCCDIR at runtime
